summary: Accepted clarification: remove OpenClaw-derived agency-loop terminology entirely, use agency/agency controller/agency cycles as canonical terms, and remove queue.json because graph state owns derived queue order.
decisions: Use agency as the canonical product/system vocabulary; do not keep agency as a live implementation term.
Rename the Pi-facing planning tool to codewiki_agency and route bounded observe/maintain/work planning through agency terminology.
Roadmap owns work truth; graph owns derived state such as queue order, routing, freshness, drift, and stop reasons.
Do not generate .codewiki/roadmap/queue.json unless a future adapter proves a concrete performance need.
assumptions: Historical builds, archived tasks, and old release checkpoints may retain past wording as history; live KB/source/skills/README/current task state should not.
non_goals: Do not implement unbounded autonomous work.
Do not remove roadmap work truth; only remove the generated queue lens.

knowledge: Update agency, graph, roadmap, overview, extension, compilers, file-structure, and lexicon docs.
roadmap: Retitle and rescope TASK-038 to trigger-based agency controller and queue.json removal.
code: Rename agency application/tool/schema/types/state concepts to agency.
